title: Eclipsis
body:
# Balance this world!

This mod adds different weapons with its unique bonuses and flaws, new dimensions in the form of the truth of the night and eternal day, new items and mechanics in the form of pocket portals and new craft stations.

 ### Weapons:
 - *Illuminator*
 - *Shadow sword*
 - *Sun ray*
 - *Night's edge*
 

### Dimentions:
  - *True night*
  - *Eternal day*
 

### Craft stations:
 - *Eclipse infuser*
 - *Quantum manipulator*
---
